hero.description: I design and develop scalable applications and interfaces with Angular, JavaScript and leading frontend libraries. I optimize performance to reduce latency and improve system responsiveness. I deliver reliable, stable solutions ready for enterprise mission-critical environments.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Senior developer with 8+ years in enterprise web
about.bio1: I am a Senior Front-End & API Developer with enterprise experience in Angular and TypeScript. I have collaborated with major companies in aerospace, defence, telco and banking, where reliability and quality are non-negotiable.
about.bio2: I am interested in the entire software development ecosystem: from application architecture to performance optimization. I transform complex processes and large amounts of data into simple, robust and easy-to-use solutions.
about.bio3: My growth has been shaped by family, my roots in Blinisht and my experience with the Ambassadors of Peace (2000-2012). These lessons taught me the value of dialogue, collaboration and sensitivity to differences.
about.bio4: I believe that the true value of a professional lies in the union of technical expertise and human sensitivity. This approach guides every project I undertake, tackling problems with responsibility, vision and a constructive spirit.

vision.title: End-to-End Vision
vision.desc: A complete architectural approach, from design system planning to production delivery. Solid experience translating complex business requirements into intuitive interfaces.

perf.title: Performance & Scalability
perf.desc: Constant focus on performance optimization, strategic lazy loading, optimized change detection and modular architectures for high-traffic contexts.

lead.title: Leadership & Mentoring
lead.desc: Technical guidance for front-end teams, best-practice definition, structured code reviews and mentoring sessions for junior and mid-level developers.

about.card_philosophy_desc: Scalable modules, SOLID, clean code and performance-first on every enterprise project.
about.card_ecosystem_desc: From bootstrapping greenfield apps to legacy refactoring, I master the full lifecycle.
about.card_data_desc: Cesium.js, Chart.js, Looker Embedded, Photo Sphere Viewer for data-rich interfaces.

experience.title: Experience

1.title: Angular Architecture & Enterprise 3D Web
1.desc: Technical leadership on enterprise projects in the aerospace and defence sectors. Advanced Angular architecture, 3D geospatial visualization with Cesium.js and high-performance analytics dashboards.

2.title: Digital Platforms & Data Visualization
2.desc: Development of innovative digital platforms in the telco and media sectors. Analytics dashboards with Looker Embedded, immersive virtual tours with Photo Sphere Viewer.

3.title: Enterprise Consulting & Microsoft Ecosystem
3.desc: Enterprise consulting on Microsoft-based projects for banking clients. Development of complex web portals, Azure integration and migration from legacy architectures to modern Angular.

4.title: Full-Stack Development & Software Architectures
4.desc: Full-stack development with .NET and Angular technologies. Software architecture design, RESTful APIs and interfaces for financial and insurance sectors.

5.title: Software Foundations & Agile Methodologies
5.desc: Beginning of the professional journey. First experiences with .NET and Angular, training on Agile methodologies and software development best practices.

skills.title: Soft Skills

skills.leadership_desc: I guide development teams toward scalable architectures and shared best practices.
skills.mentoring_desc: Active support for juniors, constructive code reviews and knowledge transfer.
skills.problem_desc: Rapid analysis of complex problems, methodical debugging and pragmatic solutions.
skills.communication_desc: Effective interaction with technical and non-technical stakeholders, clear documentation.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What do you mainly work on?
faq.a1: I work on enterprise web development, Angular interfaces, REST APIs, data visualization and 3D web applications with Cesium.js and WebGL.
faq.q2: Do you also work on backend?
faq.a2: Yes, I also have experience with .NET, Django, Python, NestJS and integration of REST and GraphQL API services.
faq.q3: Are you available for remote or hybrid projects?
faq.a3: Yes, I can work remotely or in a hybrid setup depending on project needs.
faq.a4: You can email me, send PEC, call me or reach me on LinkedIn using the contacts in the section above.

ai_ppt.hero_subtitle: Enter a topic and our AI instantly builds a full deck — titles, bullet points, speaker notes, and logical flow — ready to present.
ai_ppt.feature_ai_desc: Full presentation structure created from a single topic in seconds.
ai_ppt.feature_styles_desc: Business, Education, Minimal, Modern, and Pitch Deck styles.
ai_ppt.feature_slides_desc: Choose 5, 10, 15, or 20 slides to match your needs.
ai_ppt.feature_export_desc: Download your deck as a structured text file instantly.
ai_ppt.section_subtitle: Describe your topic and configure your deck below
ai_ppt.context_hint: Upload a PDF or TXT to give AI extra context from your own content
ai_ppt.loading_sub: Crafting slides, structure, and speaker notes…

ai_formatter.hero_subtitle: Transform raw notes, meeting minutes, or AI-generated content into beautifully structured, professional documents in seconds.
ai_formatter.feature_instant_desc: Transform raw notes or AI-generated content into structured documents in seconds.
ai_formatter.feature_smart_desc: AI intelligently detects headings, bullet points, and paragraphs from unformatted text.
ai_formatter.feature_multiple_desc: Format proposals, reports, meeting notes, résumés, and articles with context-aware styling.
ai_formatter.feature_preview_desc: Toggle between a polished formatted view and raw Markdown output instantly.
ai_formatter.section_subtitle: Paste your text below and let AI structure it instantly

pdf_translate.hero_subtitle: Enterprise-grade AI translation that keeps your document's structure, fonts, images, and layout intact — powered by GPT-4o.
pdf_translate.feature_layout_desc: Preserves columns, fonts, images, headers, footers and exact block positions.
pdf_translate.feature_ai_desc: GPT-4o powered, block-by-block translation with structure-aware prompts.
pdf_translate.feature_ocr_desc: Detects image-based PDFs automatically and processes via OCR pipeline.
pdf_translate.feature_langs_desc: English, Italian, Albanian, Spanish, German, French + 6 more.
pdf_translate.feature_enterprise_desc: 50 MB limit, smart font-scaling, overflow protection, fallback mode.
pdf_translate.mode_high_fidelity_desc: Preserves exact layout, fonts and positioning

convert.hint_json: 💡 JSON payload detected. Recommended: JSON → PDF report.
